# mtncloud_scale_threshold (Data Source)

Looks up an MTN Cloud autoscale threshold by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mtncloud_scale_threshold" "web_cpu" {
  name = "web-cpu-autoscale"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the scale threshold to look up.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the scale threshold.
- `max_count` (Number) Maximum number of instances.
- `min_count` (Number) Minimum number of instances.
